# Progress

A linear progress bar component for displaying the completion status of a task or process.

## Import

```jsx
import { Progress } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `number` | `0` | The current progress value. |
| `min` | `number` | `0` | The minimum value. |
| `max` | `number` | `100` | The maximum value. |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | `"blue"` | The color palette for the progress bar. |
| `label` | `string` | - | Accessible label for the progress bar. |
| `showValueLabel` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether to display the current value as a label. |
| `striped` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether to show a striped pattern on the progress bar. |
| `animated` | `boolean` | `false` | Whether the striped pattern should animate. Requires `striped` to be `true`. |

## Usage

### Basic Progress

```jsx
<Progress value={60} />
```

### Progress with Label

```jsx
<Progress value={75} label="Uploading..." showValueLabel />
```

### Striped and Animated

```jsx
<Progress value={50} striped animated colorPalette="green" />
```

### Custom Range

```jsx
<Progress value={3} min={0} max={10} colorPalette="purple" />
```
